description: Retrieve luxury-retail SOP passages with dense bi-encoder embeddings.
domain_relevance: This measures the semantic retrieval gain from local embeddings over purely lexical search.

test_cases.input: Can a traveller return an unopened perfume without the original receipt?
test_cases.notes: cosine_scores=[sop_returns_unopened:0.729, sop_authenticity_card:0.328, sop_missed_collection:0.285, sop_opened_cosmetics:0.64, sop_repair_watch:0.191, sop_damaged_packaging:0.338] matched_text='Unopened fragrance and cosmetics items may be returned within 14 days with the original receipt and full packaging.'

test_cases.input: What should staff do when a luxury watch authenticity card is missing?
test_cases.notes: cosine_scores=[sop_returns_unopened:0.298, sop_authenticity_card:0.829, sop_missed_collection:0.251, sop_opened_cosmetics:0.325, sop_repair_watch:0.632, sop_damaged_packaging:0.442] matched_text='If a watch authenticity card is missing, staff must verify the serial number, contact the brand liaison, and document the handover before release.'

test_cases.input: Can an airport preorder be collected after the passenger's flight departs?
test_cases.notes: cosine_scores=[sop_returns_unopened:0.186, sop_authenticity_card:0.119, sop_missed_collection:0.689, sop_opened_cosmetics:0.102, sop_repair_watch:-0.013, sop_damaged_packaging:0.187] matched_text='If a traveller misses airport preorder collection, staff must cancel the airside hold, move the item to customer service review, and contact the traveller for next steps.'

application_name: Retrieve luxury-retail SOP passages for staff questions using semantic embeddings.
